name: com.alefeng.aletoonurp
description: A high-performance NPR (anime / toon) rendering pipeline & shader for Unity URP. Includes a feature-rich Lit toon shader (shade, outline, rim light, highlight, emissive, MatCap, light settings) and an NPR water-plane shader, with a custom foldout ShaderGUI.

samples.description: Example Lit / Water Plane materials and their textures.
